case_title: RBI,INC et al VS. TRINITY AESTHETICS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND APPOINTMENT OF NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR FILED BY PETITIONER RBI,INC WALPERT HEALTHCARE CORPORATION AS TO RESPONDENT TRINITY AESTHETICS, INC. PARK, MICHAEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
